subject: Eric Roth
body:
Hi Richard,

Hope all is well.

Should you be bored this evening, we will be featured on CNBC's "Secret Lives of The Super Rich" showcasing our S-76 helicopter refurbishment for Donald Trump – thought you might enjoy getting a glimpse of what we do.

Best regards,

Eric
